mapper.sql: id, title, content, user_id, course_id, category, status, view_count, reply_count, created_time, updated_time
mapper.select: SELECT FROM discussions WHERE category = #{category} ORDER BY created_time DESC
SELECT FROM discussions WHERE status = 'active' ORDER BY (view_count + reply_count * 2) DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT FROM discussions WHERE status = 'active' ORDER BY created_time DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT category, COUNT(*) AS count FROM discussions WHERE status != 'deleted' GROUP BY category
